errors.description: The verifier federation reached the configured 2-of-3 quorum for the expected ledger head.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Only quorum-backed external verification may be treated as verified.

errors.description: The verifier federation did not reach the configured 2-of-3 quorum.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Partial verifier evidence cannot authorize governance trust.

errors.description: One or more verifier nodes were unavailable during federation verification.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Unavailable verifier nodes reduce quorum confidence and must be explicit.

errors.description: Verifier nodes reported contradictory ledger state.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Contradictory verifier state must block federation acceptance.

errors.description: Trusted anchor authority record verified for the expected ledger head.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Trusted anchor evidence must bind exactly to the accepted ledger head.

errors.description: Trusted anchor authority record is missing, malformed, or not bound to the ledger head.
errors.fail_closed_reason: External anchor trust cannot be claimed when unavailable.

errors.description: RFC3161-style timestamp metadata verified for the expected ledger head.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Timestamp evidence must bind to the expected message imprint.

errors.description: RFC3161-style timestamp metadata is missing, malformed, stale, or does not match the evidence hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Invalid timestamp evidence cannot establish external chronology.
